name: hs300_downside_propagation_v1_5_bp_filter
thesis: EMERGING_DOWN propagation that has visibly reached the index core (Bucket_Penetration_10 negative beyond train q50) has stronger forward-30-min downside than EMERGING_DOWN alone. Wave Framework Sec. 6.4 (wave penetration) empirically confirmed: 5/5 V1 candidates improve on train when this filter is applied (avg lift +2.4 to +7.8 bps). Single-dim walk-forward: 16 trades, 75% win rate, +17.77 avg net bps, t=2.82.
execution_proxy: 510300.XSHG ETF returns mapped to IF futures

data_requirements.reason_not_use_old_etf_dir: Old ETF files rounded ETF prices to 2 decimals and contaminate 5-minute returns.

z_score.method: robust per minute_idx bucket, median + 1.4826 * MAD
z_score.leak_check: value appended to deque AFTER z is computed

multiproj_features_added_in_v1_5.Bucket_Top_Sign_h: signed breadth in top weight-bucket (5 buckets by qcut on weight rank)
multiproj_features_added_in_v1_5.Bucket_Bottom_Sign_h: signed breadth in bottom weight bucket
multiproj_features_added_in_v1_5.Sector_Down_Frac_h: fraction of active sectors with signed breadth < -0.10
multiproj_features_added_in_v1_5.WavefrontDown_Frac_5: fraction of stocks newly turning sign>=0 to sign<0 at minute t

state_machine.EMERGING_DOWN_definition: Gate_5 == True AND DirScore_5 < -0.50 AND DirScore_10 < +0.45 AND Exhaustion_5 < 0.80

signal_rule.rule_for_walkforward: thresholds refit on each fold's train slice; per-fold q-values may differ

execution.entry: next minute open (etf_open at minute t+1)
execution.rationale_no_stop: V1 stop/trailing grid showed stops cut large propagation winners early; Phase 14.5 inherits the no-stop rule.

walkforward_bp_only_4_folds_120_train_20.profit_concentration: top 6 trades = 95.0% of total bps; the strategy is fat-tailed, not steady-grind

robustness_audit.v1_cherry_pick_check: ipg0_oos_strong rule generalizes to 3 independent held-out windows (+12 to +17 bps each); rule itself is not pure cherry-pick despite suggestive name

bp_filter_general_lift_on_train.interpretation: 5/5 V1 candidates improve on train, ruling out cherry-pick artifact

robustness_audit.bp_filter_oos_picture: mixed; helps score_selected (+2.17), neutral-to-negative on cherry-picked candidates whose unfiltered OOS already absorbed the marginal alpha. Sample sizes 7-12 trades all p > 0.09.

real_money_caveats: OOS sample is 7 trades. Bootstrap-extrapolated annual return (median +122%) and worst-DD-of-year (median -2.2%) ASSUME the trade distribution holds; real regime shifts can produce 2-3x worse drawdown.

95% of the strategy's profit in the 16-trade walkforward came from 6 trades. A live month without a big-down day will look like a flat strategy and that is normal, not a failure mode. Do not abandon early.
All metrics use the precise ETF directory. The old rounded ETF directory will produce contaminated 5-minute returns.
Round-trip cost 4.5 bps is a research assumption; verify your real broker IF commission + slippage matches before scaling.
Same-day overnight is not held; max 2 trades/day; no holding across roll dates.
